name: PolarDB Mem0 Long-term Memory
description: Managed long-term memory service powered by Alibaba Cloud PolarDB. Supports millisecond-level fact extraction and semantic retrieval via the Mem0 protocol.
author: PolarDB Team

env_vars.name: MEM0_API_KEY
env_vars.description: API Key obtained from the Alibaba Cloud PolarDB Console

tools.name: save_fact
tools.description: Proactively save a specific user fact, preference, or context into PolarDB cloud memory.

fact.description: The core information to remember (e.g., 'User prefers Python for data analysis').

tools.name: search_memories
tools.description: Retrieve relevant historical context or user facts from PolarDB using semantic search.

query.description: Natural language query or question to search the memory bank.
